title: thlaspi cardamine
intro: Thlaspi cardamine, also known as Lady's Smock, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Thlaspi cardamine include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in reducing fever and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Thlaspi cardamine include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, and applying the resulting liquid to the affected area or taking it internally.
